subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and faithful! Thy eloquent letter and new missive have been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و وفا نامه بلیغ و لائحه جدید ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه مضامین
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @past, present and future of Iran, @freedom of thought and action, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
